items.name_en: 🌹 BALENCIAGA*LE CITY The Tears of the Era
items.name_cn:
🌹 BALENCIAGA*LE CITY The Tears of the Era
The most iconic handbag, the Le City series, returns in 2024, reinterpreting the classic. Slightly different from the classic series, the mirror and cardholder are removed, and the strap design is more suitable for crossbody wear~ Small detail changes make the overall look lighter. The newly added macaron color series is especially suitable for spring and summer, creating a stylish collision of unruly cool looks and sweet colors, making fashion accessible.
Dimensions: 37 x 23.4 x 14.9 cm
Model: 823058 Silver nail

specs.rawTitle:

Dimensions: 37 x 23.4 x 14.9 cm
Model: 823058 Silver nail

items.name_en: Balenciaga | Hourglass bag has a new look again! !
items.name_cn:
Balenciaga | Hourglass bag has a new look again! !
From Balenciaga 22 Fall/Winter series - Crush Handbag
The powerful, practical large bag is back!
Breaking the traditional stiff bag shape, it features stitched soft calfskin paired with a rugged metal slider chain strap, allowing you to freely switch between single shoulder and crossbody styles. A casual and atmospheric vibe!
Large 32cm Small 26cm

specs.rawTitle:
Balenciaga | Hourglass bag has a new look again! !
From Balenciaga 22 Fall/Winter series - Crush Handbag
The powerful, practical large bag is back!
Breaking the traditional stiff bag shape, it features stitched soft calfskin paired with a rugged metal slider chain strap, allowing you to freely switch between single shoulder and crossbody styles. A casual and atmospheric vibe!
Large 32cm Small 26cm

items.name_en: Balenciaga Crush Hourglass Chain Bag 🛍
items.name_cn:
Balenciaga Crush Hourglass Chain Bag 🛍
The latest Crush pleated chain bag is here! Paying tribute to the classic, the unique arc shape is highly recognizable and eye-catching.
Breaking the traditional stiff silhouette, it features soft leather, multiple compartments, and large capacity. The shoulder strap is switchable for shoulder or crossbody, offering a casual and stylish look.
Unisex and trendy, versatile.
Model: 8915
Small Size: 31x20x10cm
Large Size: 40x25x13cm

items.name_en: Balenciaga Paris crush chain bag ⛓️ Classic hourglass silhouette but soft like a pillow, crumpled and unfolded vintage origami texture, timeless and versatile. The crush bag reinterprets the classic with deconstruction techniques, continuing the arched base and pointed edge design, removing handles, keeping the B buckle. Can loop the chain through the ring to fold as a handbag or clutch, or adjust to a single chain for shoulder or crossbody, one bag has four ways to wear. Model: 8911. Size: 39.9*24.9*13.0
items.name_cn: Balenciaga Paris crush chain bag ⛓️ Classic hourglass silhouette but soft like a pillow, crumpled and unfolded vintage origami texture, timeless and versatile. items.name_en: Balenciaga's key Hourglass bag for this season. The unique, iconic curved silhouette is highly recognizable and eye-catching. It features a smooth, flat surface with a crescent moon shape and a metal B-shaped pull tab. The embossed cowhide texture is stylish and chic. Size: 25.5x6x16cm Model No: 8084

items.name_en: BALENCIAGA* Monaco Series
items.name_cn:
BALENCIAGA* Monaco Series
New arrival from the Winter 23 Details Show♾️ Known for its large silhouette, the bag features a flexible and textured body. Made of super soft bursting calfskin, it creates rich layers with soft leather, adorned with the classic rounded BB logo®️
Size: 30 x 22 x 10 cm
Model 59452
